name: Pre-Sold Author Package
description: A productized six-month sequence that delivers four coordinated deliverables against a single 180-day clock: a book published through Legacy Publishing, a launched podcast inside the PodcastNetwork.org network, a live Google Knowledge Panel, and a pre-sold audience of 5,000+ opted-in readers. Application-only.

audience.audienceType: Non-fiction authors 90 to 180 days from launch with an existing 5,000+ mailing list, 25,000+ monthly podcast downloads, or an activated retail channel

priceSpecification.description: One-time payment. Paid up front to PodcastNetwork.org. Legacy Publishing takes 10% of net book sales as royalty on the resulting title. No additional upfront fee to Legacy.

itemOffered.name: The Book
itemOffered.description: Ghostwriting from your podcast catalog and source material, or a five-pass edit on a manuscript in hand. Cover, interior, ARC copies, blurbs, and retail distribution through Legacy Publishing. Manuscript handoff at Day 90. Published at Day 180.

itemOffered.name: The Podcast
itemOffered.description: A 30-day launch inside the PodcastNetwork.org network. Show branding, cover art, hosting, distribution to Apple Podcasts and Spotify, and a sequenced launch cadence. In-market by Day 30 and compounding throughout the six months.

itemOffered.name: The Knowledge Panel
itemOffered.description: Entity Home construction, Wikidata Q-number seeding, structured data markup, and Google Knowledge Graph indexing. Wikidata seed Day 1. Entity Home Day 14 to 30. Live Google Knowledge Panel by Day 180.

itemOffered.name: The Pre-Sold Audience
itemOffered.description: 12 to 15 top-tier podcast guest appearances in the author's category, booked and sequenced across Days 30 to 150. Waitlist landing page with a book-preview lead magnet. Target 5,000+ pre-orders locked before launch day.
